title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!
